definitions.text: gå over grensen for det som passer seg eller er hensiktsmessig
definitions.translation: to go beyond the limits of what is appropriate

examples.no: å si at ingen liker denne typen musikk blir å dra det for langt
examples.en: to say that nobody likes this type of music is taking it too far

examples.no: en må passe seg for å drive slankingen for langt
examples.en: you have to be careful not to take the dieting too far
